title: Production BOM Snapshot
description: Production BOM Snapshot v1 contract. Changing only anchor_rice_quantity can create a calculation/BOM snapshot; changing ratio, ingredient, unit, or structure requires a new Formula Version with approval, evidence, and audit.
$comment: Sources: PACK-02 snapshot control and PACK-03 rice-anchor scaling. TODO: exact snapshot immutability metadata is not finalized.

formula_version_id.description: Formula Version used to calculate the snapshot.

snapshot_lines.description: Calculated snapshot lines including ratio_to_rice where applicable.
